inputs.label: pKa
inputs.businessContext: Negative logarithm of the acid dissociation constant (Ka) of the weak acid.

businessContext_i18n.en: Negative logarithm of the acid dissociation constant (Ka) of the weak acid.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zayıf asidin asit ayrışma sabitinin (Ka) negatif logaritması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Negativer Logarithmus der Säuredissoziationskonstante (Ks) der schwachen Säure.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Logarithme négatif de la constante de dissociation acide (Ka) de l'acide faible.
businessContext_i18n.es: Logaritmo negativo de la constante de disociación ácida (Ka) del ácido débil.
businessContext_i18n.ar: اللوغاريتم السالب لثابت تفكك الحمض (Ka) للحمض الضعيف.

inputs.label: Concentration of Acid (HA)
inputs.businessContext: Molar concentration of the weak acid species in the buffer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar concentration of the weak acid species in the buffer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tampondaki zayıf asit türünün molar konsantrasyonu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Molare Konzentration der schwachen Säure im Puffer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Concentration molaire de l'espèce acide faible dans le tampon.
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración molar de la especie de ácido débil en el tampón.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التركيز المولي للحمض الضعيف في المحلول المنظم.

inputs.label: Concentration of Conjugate Base (A⁻)
inputs.businessContext: Molar concentration of the conjugate base species in the buffer.

businessContext_i18n.en: Molar concentration of the conjugate base species in the buffer.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tampondaki konjuge baz türünün molar konsantrasyonu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Molare Konzentration der konjugierten Base im Puffer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Concentration molaire de l'espèce base conjuguée dans le tampon.
businessContext_i18n.es: Concentración molar de la especie de base conjugada en el tampón.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التركيز المولي للنوع القاعدي المترافق في المحلول المنظم.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the buffer solution; ensure the provided pKa corresponds to this temperature.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of the buffer solution; ensure the provided pKa corresponds to this temperature.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tampon çözeltisinin sıcaklığı; sağlanan pKa'nın bu sıcaklığa karşılık geldiğinden emin olun.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur der Pufferlösung; stellen Sie sicher, dass der angegebene pKs dieser Temperatur entspricht.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température de la solution tampon ; assurez-vous que le pKa fourni correspond à cette température.
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura de la solución tampón; asegúrese de que el pKa proporcionado corresponda a esta temperatura.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حرارة المحلول المنظم؛ تأكد من أن pKa المقدم يتوافق مع هذه الدرجة.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
